episodes.title: Full Epstein Files Next Week | D.C. Daily
episodes.description: Federal judge tells Dept. of Justice to release more unredacted Epstein files next week. President Trump gets two wins on immigration from the Supreme Court but two loses on voting and citizenship in federal court. Birthright citizenship set to be decided by the high court next week.

episodes.title: EPSTEIN BLAME ON BONDI
episodes.description: Pam Bondi, President Trump's former Attorney General, testifies on Capitol Hill about the Epstein Files. A tentative deal with Iran extends the ceasefire for 60 days. Student loan borrowers have a deadline to change repayment plans or face ballooning payments.

episodes.title: LIVE: Epstein Survivors Testify Under Oath in Palm Beach | House Oversight Hearing (May 12, 2026)
episodes.description:
Democrats on the House Oversight Committee are holding a historic "shadow hearing" in West Palm Beach, Florida, to hear direct testimony from Jeffrey Epstein survivors. Led by Ranking Member Robert Garcia, this hearing marks the first time survivors are entering their accounts into the official Congressional Record since the unsealing of the massive 2026 "Epstein Files."


In this hearing:


First-hand Accounts: Survivors, including Marina Lacerda, testify about the grooming and abuse that occurred at Epstein’s Palm Beach estate.


The Missing Files: Lawmakers address the 2.5 million pages of documents still allegedly withheld by the DOJ.


Political Accountability: Fresh scrutiny on the 2008 non-prosecution agreement and the ties of high-profile figures named in the recent document dumps.

episodes.title: Epstein files: Former Victoria's Secret CEO denies ties to Epstein crimes
episodes.description: Les Wexner denied his alleged co-conspirator role in crimes tied to Jeffrey Epstein, who worked as his financial advisor.

episodes.title: Clintons refuse to testify in Epstein inquiry
episodes.description: Former President Bill Clinton and former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton refuse to comply with a congressional subpoena related to Jeffery Epstein.

episodes.title: More Epstein files released
episodes.description: FOX 26's Caroline Collins breaks down the second batch of Epstein files released by the Department of Justice.

episodes.title: FOLLOW UP: Nature Boy's chosen family speaks out after his life sentencing
episodes.description:
The man identified as a cult leader by prosecutors has support on the outside: his chosen family. In this segment, they share their side of the story.
